Pocket

A place to put your Peace

Create a New Wallet

Generate a new recovery phrase and secure it on this device.

Restore an Existing Wallet

Import your existing recovery phrase to access funds.

Already have a wallet?

Read this before you continue

Your wallet will be generated with a 24-word recovery phrase.

  • It will be shown only once.
  • If you lose it, you cannot recover your wallet.
  • Write it down and store it somewhere safe and offline.

Create a new wallet

Generates a fresh mnemonic and a device password for this wallet.

Your device password is generated automatically and shown once.

Your recovery phrase

Write this down and store it securely. Anyone with this phrase can control your funds.

You'll need this password to unlock the wallet on this device.
This replaces the generated device password.

Restore existing wallet

Paste your mnemonic to restore an existing account.

A device password will be generated for you and shown once.

Pocket Wallet v0.1.2

Ready
Wallet auto-locks after 5 minutes of inactivity.

Chain status

Send

External send uses the configured signer command and does not require the local keystore password.

Import / Export

Offline Tools

Generates a new mnemonic and address without writing to the local keystore.

Config & Payout

External signer config enables signing through a hardware wallet, HSM, or wrapper command.

Profile API

Serves local `/health`, `/payout`, and `/profile` routes for other tools. Background mode runs until the app exits.

Output
